summary: Implemented dirname caching using a Map. The cache reduces path parsing overhead during recursive directory creation. Benchmark shows ~20.8% improvement (5237.11 -> 6326.47 ops/sec).

Replaced Object.assign wrapper with direct property assignments to eliminate object creation overhead. However, benchmark shows no improvement (6309.04 vs baseline 6326.47 ops/sec, -0.27%). The Object.assign overhead at module initialization time does not impact runtime performance in this hot path.
